name: Bouranee Baunjan (Eggplant with Yoghurt Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the stems from the eggplants and leave the peel. Slice into 1 cm pieces.
2. Spread the slices on a tray and sprinkle liberally with salt. Leave for 30 minutes, then dry well with paper towels.
3. Pour enough oil into a skillet with a lid to cover the base well. Fry the eggplant until lightly browned on each side. Do not cook completely. Lift onto a plate.
4. Add more oil as required for remaining slices. As oil drains out of the eggplant, return this to the pan and add onions. Fry gently until translucent. Remove to another plate.
5. Place a layer of eggplant back into the pan. Top with some sliced onion, green pepper rings, and tomato slices. Repeat using remaining ingredients and adding a little salt and chili between layers.
6. Pour in any remaining oil from the eggplant.
7. Add onions and water, cover, and simmer gently for 10-15 minutes.
8. Combine Chakah ingredients and spread half the sauce into the base of the serving dish.
9. Top with vegetables, lifting the eggplant gently to keep slices intact. Leave some of the juices in the pan.
10. Top vegetables with the rest of the Chakah and drizzle the remaining juices over it.
11. Serve with flat bread.
